title: sh@na' #8133
definition:
1) to change, be altered, be changed
    1a) (P'al) to change, be changed
    1b) (Pael) to change, transform, frustrate
        1b1) different (participle)
    1c) (Ithpael) to be changed
    1d) (Aphel) to change, alter
